description_long: This is a large, modern sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a robust, tactical design. The rifle features a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, suitable for long-range precision shooting. It has a detachable box magazine located in front of the trigger guard, and a sturdy, adjustable stock with a cheek rest for shooter comfort. The rifle is supported by a bipod at the front, providing stability when firing from a prone or supported position. The finish is a mix of matte metallic and polymer components, with visible rails and ergonomic grips. The muzzle is fitted with a device, likely a muzzle brake, to reduce recoil.
description: A modern, heavy-barreled sniper rifle with a telescopic scope, bipod, and adjustable stock, finished in matte metal and polymer. It features a detachable box magazine and a muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bipod legs extended and the muzzle brake at the barrel's end.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the mounted scope, detachable magazine, and adjustable stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the grip and magazine.
